questions.q: Mani Ratnam's 'Roja' (1992) won the National Award for Best Direction. True or False?
Nayanthara is referred to as the 'Lady ___' of Tamil cinema, sharing her title with Rajinikanth.
Vetrimaaran's gritty 'Visaranai' (2015) was India's official selection for the Academy Awards in which year?
PS Vinothraj's minimalist debut film 'Koozhangal' (Pebbles) was India's official Oscar entry for which ceremony?
Kamal Haasan won his first National Film Award for Best Actor for which film?
questions.a: Moondram Pirai (1982, Tamil) / Swathi Muthyam (1986, Telugu) — accept either
